hero_subtitle: A hardcore quest-based modpack for Minecraft 1.7.10, inspired by GTNH with a unique nuclear-powered progression.
features_core_desc: Experience a meticulously crafted journey where every advancement requires strategic thinking and mastery of nuclear technology.
download_section_desc: Download the modpack and begin your nuclear-powered journey today
feature_1_desc: Guide you from stone tools to interstellar technologies with logical progression paths and meaningful rewards at every stage.
feature_2_desc: Nearly all recipes reworked to align with Nuclear Tech philosophy, creating a cohesive and balanced technological journey.
feature_3_desc: Revised hunger system requiring varied nutrition, smarter mobs, deadlier mechanics, and epic boss battles that test your limits.
feature_4_desc: Continuous development with new content, balance improvements, and bug fixes to keep the experience fresh and engaging.
feature_5_desc: Community-driven translations via Crowdin platform ensuring accessibility for players worldwide.
feature_6_desc: Angelica + ArchaicFix integration delivering smooth gameplay even on low-end systems without sacrificing visual quality.
feature_7_desc: New dimensions, celestial mechanics, and advanced technologies to conquer the cosmos and unlock humanity's future.
community_cta_title: Are you ready to take on the New Horizons challenge?
community_cta_subtitle: Join hundreds of players exploring the nuclear-powered future of Minecraft
latest_release_desc: Get the most recent version of Nuclear Tech: New Horizons
nav_download_description: Get the latest official releases of the modpack directly from GitHub.
error_failed_load: Failed to load releases. Please check the console for details and try again later.
no_assets: No assets attached to this release.
copyright_notice: © {year} Nuclear Tech: New Horizons. All rights reserved.
inspired_by: Inspired by the spirit of GTNH, but with a unique NTM style! 🔥
fan_project_disclaimer: This is a fan project not affiliated with Mojang Studios, Minecraft, or any other trademark holders.
